item.title: Cornell Tech announces 2026 Frontiers of AI Summit
item.description: Cornell Tech announces the inaugural Frontiers of AI Summit (also tagged Health for cross-discipline overlap).
item.dc:creator: gs775

item.title: Deadly feline coronavirus variant has been present in the U.S. for over a decade
item.description: A study from Cornell veterinary researchers shows a deadly feline coronavirus variant has circulated in the U.S. for over ten years.
item.dc:creator: lec27
